title: Corelib harness performance (engine reuse, sub-5min matrix)
body:
After functional matrix green: reuse `Engine` per target in test harness; single `beskid test --all-targets` in [`run_corelib_tests.py`](compiler/corelib/ci/run_corelib_tests.py).

## Acceptance

- Full 42-target matrix under **5 minutes**
- Simple assert targets under **200ms**

## Blocked on

`corelib-matrix-green` exit (42/42 functional pass)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`

subtasks.text: Engine reuse per target in test harness
